title: VBRC Base By Base: Export an image of the alignment
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"f8f0i","text":"Viral Bioinformatic Resource Centre","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":35}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dok08","text":"Provide databases of viral genomic information.  ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":47}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dladn","text":"Please check the Organisms menu to see which viruses we support: we’re now focusing on large DNA viruses","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":17,"length":9},{"style":"italic","offset":17,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8utm2","text":"
 ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1d7ve","text":"The VOCs (Virus Orthologous Clusters) database is at the heart of our system.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2cvsv","text":"
 ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"o4dl","text":"The database links directly to integrated tools for comparative analyses.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5845o","text":"
 ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3h8fd","text":"VOCs sorts genes into ortholog clusters (e.g. RNA polymerase) to simplify data retrieval.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"es3v7","text":"
  ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7596b","text":"Provide easy access to the genes, gene families, and genomes of the different virus families.  ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":93}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"21pm1","text":"via a unique series of powerful Java tools that support multiple computer platforms (see VBRC Tools menu).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":1,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":89,"length":10},{"style":"italic","offset":89,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cdv3g","text":"

steps: Any BBB alignment can be exported to an image. Select “Export Alignment Image” from the File menu.
A window containing image options will open; adjust these if desired, then click “OK”
creator: Nick Tang
